kind: ZprPolicy
metadata:
  name: zprpolicy-sample
spec:

  name: zprpolicy-sample
  description: Sample Zero Trust Packet Routing policy
  statements:
    - "ALLOW any-user to communicate in tenancy where source.resource.compartment.id = target.resource.compartment.id"
